## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build or CI change

## Testing

- [ ] `dart format .`
- [ ] `flutter analyze`
- [ ] `flutter test`
- [ ] Tested manually on Android

## Privacy and security

- [ ] No API keys, OAuth secrets, signing files, credentials, or private PDFs are included.
- [ ] Logs and screenshots have been checked for personal information.

## Screenshots or recordings

Add media for user-interface changes when useful.

## Related issues

Closes #
